meta.description: Curated geopolitical events. Each event is annotated on the keyword-trends chart at its year. Kept short — ~8 events to avoid clutter.

events.label: Berlin Wall falls
events.description: End of the European Communist bloc; the Cold War vocabulary starts collapsing.

events.label: USSR dissolved
events.description: Soviet Union breaks into 15 states; UN membership jumps and Cold War language disappears from speeches.

events.label: Rwandan genocide
events.description: An estimated 800,000 people killed in 100 days. Refugee and conflict language rise in the following years.

events.label: September 11 attacks
events.description: Coordinated attacks in the United States; 'terror' goes from background noise to one of the most-mentioned words for years.

events.label: IPCC 4th report · Bali
events.description: The IPCC's Fourth Assessment and the Bali Roadmap put climate firmly on the UN agenda. 'Climate' rates surge.

events.label: Global financial crisis
events.description: Collapse of major banks triggers a worldwide recession; economic language returns to the spotlight in 2009.

events.label: Arab Spring
events.description: Uprisings across the Arab world; conflicts in Libya, Syria and Yemen reshape terror, refugee and democracy talk.

events.label: Paris Accord · refugee crisis
events.description: Historic climate agreement and a peak European refugee crisis; both topics dominate the 2015 speeches.
